Unwind process flow

End-to-end unwind process — 13 steps  ·  Click any image to expand

Comms
Lenvi
HPI
Internal
1
Unwind request received
Partner/customer informs of unwind — usually via Intercom
click to expand
An unwind request usually comes in via Intercom from the partner (or customer). The message will typically include the customer name and vehicle registration. Create a ticket in the cancellations/unwind Intercom inbox and attach the conversation to the ticket. Update the ticket notes with key details, e.g. context and date of agreement.
2
Confirm with partner & customer
Get written confirmation of reason for unwind from both parties
click to expand
Contact both the partner and the customer separately to confirm the reason for the unwind. The customer should confirm they no longer wish to proceed. Keep a record of both confirmations — required before any further action.
3
Check cooling-off period
Check agreement start date on Lenvi — must be within 2 weeks
click to expand
Navigate to the agreement on Lenvi and check the Start Date under the Agreement section. The unwind can only proceed if it falls within the 2-week cooling-off period. If outside this window, escalate to your team lead.
4
Send email to partner
Send bank details document so partner can return the funds
click to expand
Once you have confirmation from both parties and have verified the cooling-off period, send the partner an email confirming the unwind can proceed. Attach the bank details document (available in the guide) so they know where to return the funds. Ask them to reference the vehicle reg number.
5
Monitor Ops report & identify funds in CSV
Check Ops report daily — match partner name, vehicle reg & amount
click to expand
Check the Ops report each day until the funds arrive — typically a few days. When funds appear in the CSV, locate the correct row and verify: amount matches the advance, bank ref shows the partner name, and description includes the vehicle reg number.
6
Match funds to Lenvi agreement
Verify the advance and asset summary on Lenvi match the incoming funds
click to expand
Open the agreement on Lenvi and cross-reference the Advance amount and Asset Summary (reg number, make, model) against the CSV row. All three should match before proceeding.
7
Apply Stop Category: Unwind
Actions → Stop Category → select Unwind → Save
click to expand
On the Lenvi agreement, click the Actions button and select Stop Category. Select Unwind from the dropdown, then click Save. This flags the agreement for unwinding.
8
Confirm stop category applied
Apply Stop Category: Unwind → Save
click to expand
You will see the Apply Stop Category screen confirming the category is set to Unwind. Click Save to lock in the stop category. The agreement header will now display the Unwind badge.
9
Unwind the agreement on Lenvi
Actions → Unwind
click to expand
Click Actions again and select Unwind from the menu. This initiates the unwind on Lenvi and begins reversing the agreement. Confirm the action when prompted.
10
Confirm unwind complete
Verify balance is £0 — small loans may show 99.9% due to a Lenvi charge
click to expand
Check the agreement summary to confirm Balance shows £0.00 and progress shows 100% complete. ⚠️ Note: for smaller loan sizes it is common to see 99.9% complete — this is due to a Lenvi system charge and is expected. Flag this to the support team so they can confirm it is not a discrepancy.
11
HPI de-registration
Registrations → Finance → Delete → enter reg number → Next
click to expand
Navigate to the HPI Check website. Go to the Registrations tab and click Finance. Select Delete, enter the vehicle registration number, and click Next.
12
Confirm HPI deletion
Check details match the agreement, then click Delete
click to expand
A confirmation screen will show the vehicle and agreement details. Verify the registration number, VIN, and agreement reference all match Lenvi. Once confirmed, click Delete to complete the HPI de-registration.
13
Wrap up — email, update & close
Email both parties, update Intercom ticket, resolve and close
click to expand
Email the partner to confirm funds received and unwind complete. Email the customer to confirm their agreement is cancelled. Update the Intercom ticket with a note of all steps actioned (see template in screenshot). Finally, resolve and close the ticket.
click anywhere outside to close · press Esc to close
